meta.title: Shopify Online Store Service | Unique Logic - Grow your business with a professional Shopify store setup
meta.description: Launch and grow your business with professional Shopify store setup, performance-driven paid advertising, and SEM strategies. Our Hong Kong team specializes in Google Ads and PPC campaigns to drive traffic, sales and long-term growth.

hero.subtitle: Move from offline to online store

intro.label: Service Overview
intro.p1: We do more than build websites - we create a profit engine designed to convert.
intro.p2: From brand design to precision acquisition, we turn your traffic into real brand assets.

challenges.label: Why Choose Us
challenges.desc: Why are legacy systems limiting your growth?

f1.title: Scalability Limitations
f1.desc:
Traditional platforms struggle with global expansion across multiple languages and currencies.
This leads to missed overseas opportunities.

f2.title: Maintenance Cost and Security Risk
f2.desc:
Open-source systems (such as WooCommerce and Magento) often face technical debt, plugin conflicts, and security vulnerabilities.
They usually require expensive manual maintenance.

f3.title: Data Integration Gaps
f3.desc:
When ad platform data is disconnected from website data, you cannot measure true ROAS.
We close the gap between ad spend and conversion value.

results.label: Results-Driven
results.desc_line1: We do more than launch websites - we build a sales engine.
results.desc_line2: Built to solve the growth bottlenecks faced by most new sellers.

c1.title: Precise, Real-Time Traffic
c1.desc: We integrate Google and Meta advertising capabilities to find the right audience for your products - no wasted spend on low-quality traffic.

c2.title: Maximize return on investment (ROI)
c2.desc: By optimizing the page UI/UX design, we provide two design orientations: narrative-driven and efficient conversion.

c3.title: Global SEO and AI Search Optimization
c3.desc: Not only does it need to be ranked, but it also needs to be recommended. Optimize for traditional search engines and emerging AI search (GEO).

c4.title: Advanced Ecommerce Analytics
c4.desc: Advanced GA4 event tracking, complete funnel analysis, and full monitoring from "browse" to "purchase".

c5.title: High Stability
c5.desc: Compliance and global cloud hosting ensure that the website remains smooth during the peak traffic periods of "Double 11" or "Black Friday".

c6.title: Global Expansion
c6.desc: Built-in 100+ currency and language switching functions to help your brand reach global consumers instantly.

process.label: Process
process.desc_line1: From data collection, design, testing to official launch.

s1.title: Asset audit
s1.desc: Prepare brand assets, product data, and payment gateway integration.

s2.title: Architecture and UX Planning
s2.desc: Define information architecture and navigation logic.

s3.title: Development and implementation
s3.desc: Custom theme development and app integrations.

s4.title: End-to-End Testing
s4.desc: Stress test checkout process and data postback verification

s5.title: Launch and Training
s5.desc: Domain connection, backend operation training and official launch

q01.q: Why is Shopify better than “free” open source platforms?
q01.a: If you calculate the "total cost of ownership (TCO)", open source platforms are not cheap. Shopify’s SaaS model is more cost-effective and stable in the long run.

q02.q: How long does a project usually take?
q02.a: It usually takes 10-12 weeks to build a high-quality brand official website, depending on the number of products and the complexity of integrating third-party systems.

q03.q: In addition to Shopify’s monthly fee, are there any other hidden fees I need to pay?
q03.a: Cost transparency is our standard. Unique Logic provides a complete annual cost estimate during the planning stage.

q04.q: Is Shopify good for SEO? Will changing the system affect my search ranking?
q04.a: Shopify itself has a very SEO-friendly structure. Unique Logic enforces strict 301 redirect policies and is optimized for AI search (GEO).

q05.q: My current physical store has a POS system, can it be synced with Shopify inventory?
q05.a: Absolutely. Shopify has a powerful API interface.

q06.q: I don’t understand technology. Can I modify the content after the website is online?
q06.a: Absolutely. Shopify’s admin is intuitive, and we provide one-on-one training plus an operations guide.

q07.q: My target customers are overseas, how does Shopify handle multi-language and multi-currency?
q07.a: We'll help you go global with Shopify Markets features.

q08.q: Can Shopify’s checkout page be customized?
q08.a: The checkout process is standardized under the general plan. For deep customization, it is recommended to upgrade to Shopify Plus or use UI Extensions.
